context: Evaluates the agent's ability to create a plan with frontmatter, phases/tasks/waves, and validation.

checklist.name: Gather specification
checklist.description: Agent asks about goal, scope, phases, tasks, dependencies, risks

checklist.name: Infer conventions
checklist.description: Agent scans existing plans with grep to infer local section conventions

checklist.name: Valid frontmatter
checklist.description: Created plan has YAML frontmatter with title, type: PLAN, status: DRAFT, date

checklist.name: Phases and tasks
checklist.description: Plan body has ## Phases with concrete tasks and wave annotations

checklist.name: Validation run
checklist.description: Agent runs validate-context-frontmatter.sh on the created file

checklist.name: Offer plan-review
checklist.description: Agent offers to run the plan-review skill on the new plan
